_notes: Scene presets — civitai-researched (Apr 2026). Trigger words are creator-verified where possible.
Each preset stacks 1-3 content LoRAs + optional style/expression overlays.
Stacking rules: max 3 content LoRAs, combined strength ≤ 2.5, HIGH pairs with HIGH / LOW with LOW.
Base LoRAs (SECRET_SAUCE, FusionX, CubeyAI-General) assumed always on — NOT counted in the stack.
Speed LoRAs (Lightning/lightx2v/Seko) managed by Quality preset — untouched by scene selection.
Instagirl at 0.5-0.7 stackable for realism — add manually.
CRITICAL: LocalOptima LoRAs (Oral-Ins, CumShot) explicitly INCOMPATIBLE with LightX2V — creator warning.
CRITICAL: Piledriver fails on large/veiny penises — don't stack BigCockOral under it.
Edit `name_contains` substrings or strengths to taste. [BRACKET] placeholders get filled by user.
